issue.message: Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Accessing internal APIs via reflection is not supported and may not work on all devices or in the future
Accessing internal APIs via reflection is not supported and may not work on all devices or in the future

Accessing internal APIs via reflection is not supported and may not work on all devices or in the future
Found dynamic locale changes, but did not find corresponding Play Core library calls for downloading languages and splitting by language is not disabled in the `bundle` configuration
Permission is only granted to system apps

issue.message: "nao" is a common misspelling; did you mean "não"?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="settings_error_dns">Servidor inacessivel: a internet do carro nao consegue resolver este endereco (DNS)</string>

issue.message: "nao" is a common misspelling; did you mean "não"?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="settings_error_timeout">O servidor nao respondeu a tempo</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("trips"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("rules"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("automations"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="places_delete_blocked_message">Place is used in %1$d automations. Delete the rules first.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("trips"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("trips"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("trips"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="settings_export_done">Exported: %1$d trips, %2$d charging sessions, %3$d track points, %4$d idle drains</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("trips"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="local_insight_short_trips">%1$d of %2$d trips under 5 km (%3$d%%) — combine short errands</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("sessions"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="local_insight_dc_heavy">DC %1$.0f kWh (%2$d sessions) vs AC %3$.0f — home AC is gentler for daily use</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("charges"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="local_insight_ac_only">All %2$d charges were AC (%1$.0f kWh) — good for battery and budget</string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="local_insight_ac_only_month">All %2$d charges this month were AC (%1$.0f kWh), good for battery and budget</string>

issue.message: Missing x86_64 ABI support for ChromeOS
issue.errorLine1: ndk { abiFilters += listOf("arm64-v8a") } // DiLink is arm64-only; single ABI keeps sherpa-onnx native libs small

issue.message: Do not place Android context classes in static fields; this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields; this is a memory leak

<string name="settings_agent_name_hint">Por exemplo: Leo. Melhor 2-3 sílabas, uma palavra distinta</string>
<string name="settings_agent_name_hint">For example: Leo. 2-3 syllables, a distinct word works best</string>

<string name="settings_agent_name_hint">Например: Лео. Лучше 2-3 слога, отчётливое слово</string>

issue.message: Use fraction character ⅓ (⅓) instead of 1/3?
